metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: Intel's Centrino wireless notebook launch was the hot topic in the industry this week. We covered the launch from the corporate buyer's prospective in a Hot Topic.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-03-16

metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: Get $150 off for all Pentium 4 computer packages (bundled deals) this week at BestBuy stores. Free shipping on HP consiguration station configurations.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: This week, get $100 gift card on all desktop and notebook systems, and no interest for 12 months at Circuit City. Circuitcity.com has reintroduced free shipping for a limited time on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: This week, CompUSA offers $100 off AMD Athlon XP bundles, and $150 off Intel Pentium 4-based bundles. In addition, there is attractive 12 month, no interest-no payments financing on systems over $599.

metric_name: EMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: EMachines has new models out. Check out BestBuy's bundled deals on these new machines.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: Dell's online deals include $150 instant savings on 4550 series, free CD-RW in second bay, a free hard drive upgrade to 60 GB, and free shipping. It's no longer an option to put a 2.4 GHz P4 processor in an Dimension 4550, meaning that a P4 2.53 GHz processor is now the bottom...

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: Gateway offers free shipping again. Gateway revamped its website and has severely cut back on PC models for the home.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: Sony Online has introduced new models at competitive prices. It appears that prices have risen slightly this week, but there are still great deals to be found.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-03-16
metric_value: HP Online continues to be competitive with retail deals, but the resurgence of weekly offers means that you're best bundled deals are at stores like CompUSA. HP Online does offer free shipping on orders over $250, as well $1 CD-RW and $99 17" monitors, when purchasing a custom...
